tools.name: bettermode_get_network
tools.description: Get top-level info about the Bettermode community ("network") this token belongs to — id, name, primary domain/subdomain, status, creation date, and total member count. No arguments. Bettermode GraphQL query: network.

tools.name: bettermode_list_spaces
tools.description: List spaces (the containers for posts — e.g. discussions, Q&A, articles) in the community, with pagination. Optionally filter by name (`query`), order (`orderBy`, a SpaceListOrderByEnum value), and reverse the order. Returns edges[].node plus pageInfo and totalCount. Bettermode GraphQL query: spaces

tools.name: bettermode_get_space
tools.description: Get a single space by its `id` OR its `slug` (provide exactly one). Returns the space's name, slug, description, type, creation date, and member/post counts. Bettermode GraphQL query: space.

tools.name: bettermode_list_members
tools.description: List members of the community, with pagination. Optionally filter by a search term (`query`, matches name/username/email), by role (`roleIds`), order (`orderBy`), and reverse. Returns edges[].node (with role) plus pageInfo and totalCount. Bettermode GraphQL query: members.

tools.name: bettermode_get_member
tools.description: Get a single community member by their `id`. Returns name, username, email, status, creation date, role, and tagline. Bettermode GraphQL query: member.

tools.name: bettermode_list_posts
tools.description: List posts across the community, with pagination. Optionally scope to one or more spaces (`spaceIds`), order (`orderBy`, passed through as a plain string), and reverse. Returns edges[].node (title, shortContent, space, owner) plus pageInfo and totalCount. Bettermode GraphQL query: posts.

tools.name: bettermode_get_post
tools.description: Get a single post by its `id`. Returns title, shortContent, creation date, space, owner (member), and reaction/reply counts. Bettermode GraphQL query: post.

tools.name: bettermode_search
tools.description: Full-text search across the community (members, spaces, posts, …). Provide a `query` term; results come back grouped by entity type, each hit with id, title, subtitle, content, url, and entityId. Bettermode GraphQL query: search.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: bettermode_list_spaces, bettermode_get_space, bettermode_list_members, bettermode_get_member, bettermode_list_posts, bettermode_get_post, bettermode_search · Private data: bettermode_get_network · Public sink: bettermode_get_space, bettermode_list_members, bettermode_get_member, bettermode_get_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: bettermode_list_spaces, bettermode_get_space, bettermode_list_members, bettermode_get_member, bettermode_list_posts, bettermode_get_post, bettermode_search · Private data: bettermode_get_network · Public sink: bettermode_get_space, bettermode_list_members, bettermode_get_member, bettermode_get_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
